## Week in Review: 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 33.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Liberal**: Avg interest 4.1 (+61.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.36)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 33.0 (+413.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.1 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
